allow: PowerShell($snd='C:\\claude_code_projects\\tank.mp3'; try{ Add-Type -AssemblyName presentationCore; $p=New-Object System.Windows.Media.MediaPlayer; $p.Open\([uri]$snd\); $n=0; while\(-not $p.NaturalDuration.HasTimeSpan -and $n -lt 20\){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 100;$n++}; $d=if\($p.NaturalDuration.HasTimeSpan\){$p.NaturalDuration.TimeSpan.TotalSeconds}else{5}; $p.Play\(\); Start-Sleep -Seconds \([math]::Min\([math]::Ceiling\($d\)+1,8\)\); $p.Stop\(\); $p.Close\(\); "played $snd, dur=$d sec" }catch{ "ERROR: $_" })
